---
title: "GBM Proteometabolomics"
description: "Reproducible analysis for proteometabolomics of initial and recurrent glioblastoma."
---

This project contains reproducible analyses for the manuscript *Proteometabolomics of initial and recurrent glioblastoma highlights an increased immune cell signature with altered lipid metabolism*.

The repository includes reports for general proteomics analysis, large-scale proteolytic processing analysis, integrative lipidomics and proteomics, proteogenomics analyses, plasma ELISA proteomics, and single-cell RNA-seq data mining.

## Highlights

- Clinical proteomics and recurrent glioblastoma analysis.
- Integration of proteomics, lipidomics, proteogenomics, and clinical data.
- Reproducible report structure for manuscript-associated analyses.
- Related to the *Neuro-Oncology* publication.

## Links

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/MiguelCos/gbm_manuscript_data_analysis)
- [Publication DOI](https://doi.org/10.1093/neuonc/noad208)

:::{.tags}
[`clinical proteomics`]{.tag} [`multi-omics`]{.tag} [`glioblastoma`]{.tag} [`R`]{.tag}
:::
